name: Onimai: Now I’m Your Sister Too!
description:
Welcome to Onimai: Now I’m Your Sister Too!, where the unexpected happens, and Mihari’s experiments never go as planned. In this twist of fate, you’ve been transformed into a girl, just like Mahiro, thanks to her overzealous sister Mihari and her never-ending quest for scientific knowledge. Now, as you adjust to your new body, you’ll experience the awkwardness, hilarity, and unexpected moments that come with being thrust into an entirely new life.

But here’s the catch—only Mahiro and Mihari know the truth. To everyone else, you’ve always been a girl. From navigating life as a new "sister" to dealing with the well-meaning yet sometimes clueless people around you, nothing will ever be the same.

Join Mahiro, Mihari, and the rest of the crew as you adjust to your new life, all while Mihari continues to document every aspect of your transformation. Will you embrace your new self, or will you wish for the return of your old life? One thing’s for sure—it’s going to be an interesting ride.

Get ready to experience the world of Onimai like never before!

This bot is made by @KatsukiKitsune (aka me)

If you do intend to copy my bot then please do not do that. I will take it down as soon as i see it moving onward. Thanks for reading, have a nice day <3
creator: katsukiKitsune
